title: How a man of God becomes worth marrying
caption:
The man worth finding first has to become the man worth keeping.

Most guys are looking for a relationship before they've done the work that would make them a good partner. That's backwards.

Get right with God first. Kill the habits that would corrupt the relationship. Build something worth inviting a woman into. Then release the timeline — because the guy desperate for a wife reeks of it, and everyone can tell.

The order matters. A man who gets it right stops smelling like desperation and starts becoming who God actually had in mind.

"Seek first the kingdom of God and his righteousness, and all these things will be added to you." — Matthew 6:33

Save this for the man who's asking God for a wife before he's asked God to make him ready.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #relationships #discipline #christianity #scripture
theme: He chases God, not a wife.
